steps.title: Combine Flanagan's achievements
steps.content: The passage centers on Nora Flanagan's work as FTP director. It says she created jobs for over 12,500 theater professionals and kept ticket prices low so many people could experience theater for the first time.

steps.title: Avoid single-detail summaries
steps.content: Choice A mentions only the employment side. Choice B gives background about why the WPA was created. Choice C identifies an affordability problem but not Flanagan's response or the job creation. The answer is D.
